identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a POS interface that disappears, leaving only speed and clarity.

grid_system.pos_cart: col-span-12 md:col-span-4 h-full border-l border-border bg-surface p-4 flex flex-col
grid_system.admin_dashboard: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-8

containers.card: bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-6 shadow-sm
containers.modal: bg-background border border-border rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-6 max-w-lg w-full

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-6 rounded-lg font-medium transition-colors
variants.outline: border border-input bg-transparent hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground h-12 px-6 rounded-lg transition-colors
variants.swish: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#D41420] to-[#F78F30] text-white font-bold h-14 text-lg w-full rounded-xl shadow-lg hover:brightness-110 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all

Button.rules: Always use 'h-12' or larger for touch targets on POS screens.

ProductCard.structure: flex flex-col h-full bg-surface border border-border rounded-lg overflow-hidden active:scale-[0.98] transition-transform

Input.base: flex h-12 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'NativeWind' for styling. All Tailwind classes must be compatible with React Native (e.g., no 'grid' in RN, use Flexbox).
For the Web version, ensure 'display: grid' is handled conditionally or use Flexbox for universal compatibility.
Implement the 'POS Layout' as a Split View: Left Side = Product Grid (Scrollable), Right Side = Cart (Fixed).
Swish Payment Flow: 1. Cart Total -> 2. Click 'Pay with Swish' -> 3. Show QR Code Modal/Screen -> 4. Simulate Webhook confirmation.
Use the provided 'ProductCard' structure for the grid. Images must be touchable.
Ensure all text is in SWEDISH language.
Admin Panel: Use a dense table layout for Products list. Use Recharts for Sales Stats.
Customer Display: This is a separate route '/customer-display'. It should show the Logo, current Cart Items, and a Big QR Code when payment is active.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where supported (Web only) or solid translucent colors (Mobile).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
